---
title: "Thank You | Ayel L. R. Batac"
title-block: false
canonical-url: https://ayelbatac.github.io/thank-you
description: "Confirmation that your message has been successfully submitted."
listing: false
search: false

format:
  html:
    toc: false
    anchor-links: false
---

<div style="margin-top: 3.5rem;">

## ✅ Message Received

Thank you for reaching out.

Your message has been received successfully. I will review it and get back to you within 24–48 hours.

</div>

```{=html}

<!-- Back to Home Section -->
<div style="width: 100vw; margin-left: calc(-50vw + 50%); padding: 3rem 2rem; background-color: #ffffff; text-align: center;">

  <div style="display: flex; justify-content: center; max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto;">

    <a href="/" class="explore-button">Return Home</a>

  </div>

</div>

```

$~$

$~$
